resources.string: Today\'s prayer times for a UK city.
Dawn · Sunrise · Noon · Maghrib · Midnight — for a UK city. Display only, no alarms.
Add it from your Home screen

Prefer to place it yourself? Long‑press an empty spot on your Home screen → Widgets → find Prayer Times → drag it out. Resize it anywhere from 2×2 up to a large card. Long‑press → Reconfigure to change the city.
Tap the button and confirm — Android drops the widget on your Home screen. Then long‑press it → Reconfigure to pick a city (defaults to London).
